title: Monetdb Python UDF crashes because of null aggr_group_arr
poc: CREATE AGGREGATE python_sum(i INT) RETURNS INT LANGUAGE PYTHON { return sum(i); };
select python_sum(i) from integers where i = 1 group by i;
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, value INT, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_data VALUES (1, 10, 'A', NULL), (2, NULL, 'B', NULL), (3, 30, 'C', NULL);
CREATE AGGREGATE python_avg(value INT) RETURNS FLOAT LANGUAGE PYTHON { return sum(value) / len(value);
SELECT python_avg(value) FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL GROUP BY name;
SELECT * FROM test_data WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_data WHERE value IS NULL);
